title: Cozy Dutch Potato Dumplings
description: A rich, chewy Dutch-style potato dumpling that pairs creamy potatoes with a spicy Tabasco kick and tangy pickle, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Boil the potatoes whole until tender, about 20 minutes, then drain and peel.
Mash the hot potatoes with a fork or potato masher until smooth and slightly chunky.
Add salt, pepper, milk, flour, and egg to the mashed potatoes and mix until a pliable dough forms.
Fold in the shredded cheese, pickle relish, and Tabasco sauce, adjusting the heat to taste.
Shape the dough into small, round dumplings about the size of a golf ball.
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat and lightly grease with butter.
Cook the dumplings in batches, turning gently, until they are golden brown on all sides, about 4-5 minutes per batch.
Remove the dumplings from the skillet and drain on a paper towel.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve hot with a side of mustard or a light salad.
Enjoy the chewy, comforting flavor of this Dutch-inspired potato dumpling.
